req.title: Accessibility compliance
req.statement: All UI screens shall be keyboard-navigable and meet WCAG 2.1 AA contrast ratios.

doc.reasoning: R-WEB-112 mandates WCAG 2.1 AA contrast ratios and full keyboard navigability across all hr-app screens. Three complementary tests are designed: (1) EP positive – a representative rendered screen passes axe-core contrast checks, confirming the happy path for a typical compliant page; (2) NEG negative – a deliberately injected low-contrast element triggers a reported violation, validating the error pathway; (3) BVA boundary – the exact WCAG 2.1 AA contrast threshold (4.5:1 for normal text) is exercised at its minimum passing value, probing the edge between pass and fail. A fourth STC test covers keyboard-focus state transitions through the interactive widget chain. All tests use Playwright via pytest-playwright and axe-playwright helper fixtures.

tests.name: test_homepage_passes_wcag_aa_contrast
preconditions: hr-app is running and reachable at BASE_URL
actions: Run axe-core audit scoped to WCAG 2.1 AA rules: color-contrast
expected: Zero color-contrast violations reported by axe-core
tests.executable:
import pytest
from playwright.sync_api import Page

BASE_URL = "http://localhost:3000"

def test_homepage_passes_wcag_aa_contrast(page: Page):
    page.goto(BASE_URL + "/", wait_until="networkidle")
    assert page.title() != "", "Page must render a title"

    violations = <helper_fn: run_axe>(page, tags=["wcag2aa"], rules=["color-contrast"])

    assert violations == [], (
        f"WCAG AA contrast violations found: {violations}"
    )

tests.name: test_low_contrast_element_reports_violation
preconditions: hr-app is running and reachable at BASE_URL
Test is permitted to inject inline styles via JavaScript
actions:
Inject a

element with foreground #aaaaaa on background #ffffff (ratio ~1.6:1, below 4.5:1)
Run axe-core audit scoped to color-contrast rule
expected: At least one color-contrast violation is reported
Violation description references the injected element

tests.name: test_contrast_ratio_at_wcag_aa_minimum_boundary
preconditions: hr-app is running and reachable at BASE_URL
Test is permitted to inject inline styles via JavaScript
actions: Inject normal text element at exactly 4.5:1 contrast ratio (#767676 on #ffffff)
Run axe-core audit scoped to color-contrast rule
Inject a second element just below threshold at 4.48:1 (#777777 on #ffffff)
expected: Element at 4.5:1 ratio produces zero color-contrast violations (boundary pass)
Element at 4.48:1 ratio produces at least one color-contrast violation (boundary fail)
trace: R-WEB-112: WCAG 2.1 AA minimum contrast 4.5:1 for normal text
R-WEB-112: BVA at exact threshold boundary

tests.name: test_keyboard_navigation_traverses_all_interactive_elements
preconditions: hr-app is running and reachable at BASE_URL
Login screen is rendered with at least username, password, and submit controls
actions: Record initial focused element via document.activeElement
Press Tab repeatedly and collect focused element tag+id pairs until focus wraps or 20 iterations
Assert that username input, password input, and submit button each received focus
expected: username input is reachable via Tab
password input is reachable via Tab
submit button is reachable via Tab
No interactive element is skipped (focus order is contiguous)
trace: R-WEB-112: STC – idle -> focused -> next-focused -> submit-focused states
